{{CargoRelic
|name=Fruit of Doom
|class_id=20230
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=This fruit-like object contains forbidden power. With one bite, you can get a unique ability. To keep the players under control, the devs canceled the consume option!
|fame=17
|art=14
|fth=27
|civ=14
|tech=15
|ss1=Per 5 Jinx Points, Snail HP +10<br>Jinx Points: 50/50
|ss2=Per 5 Jinx Points, Snail HP +20<br>Jinx Points: 50/50
|ss3=Per 5 Jinx Points, Snail HP +30<br>Jinx Points: 50/50
|ss4=Per 5 Jinx Points, Snail HP +30<br>Jinx Points: 50/50
|ss7=Per 5 Jinx Points, Snail HP +30<br>Jinx Points: 50/50<br> (Awakened)
}}
